description_long: This is a rectangular, softcover book with a predominantly white cover featuring a photographic image of a tranquil outdoor scene with greenery and a stone lantern. The cover includes a large, bold title in black and blue, as well as a red circular badge highlighting a feature of the book. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with a visible spine and clean, sharp edges. The publisher's logo is present on the lower left corner of the front cover and the spine, both in black and red. The overall design is modern and professional, with a matte finish and minimalistic layout. The book is likely a technical or instructional manual, given the style and layout of the cover.
description: A white, softcover book with a photographic cover image, bold title text, and a red badge, featuring a modern, clean design.
description_view_0: The front cover is fully visible, showing the photographic image, bold title, red badge, and publisher's logo.
description_view_1: The book is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the thickness and the left edge of the cover.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the bottom edge, showing the white pages and the lower part of the cover.
description_view_3: The book is angled to show the spine, with the title text and publisher's logo visible along the edge.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a photographic image of a serene outdoor setting with a reflective water surface and a traditional stone lantern surrounded by greenery. The style is realistic and tranquil, evoking a sense of calm and focus.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with black and blue text oriented horizontally, matching the front cover's style. The publisher's logo appears at the bottom of the spine in black and red.
attribute_publisher_logo: A rectangular black and red logo is visible on the lower left corner of the front cover and at the bottom of the spine.
